sections.title: Foundational Synthesis — Automation Layer Classification
required_elements: Automation stack classification (software RPA, industrial robotics, cobots, mobile/warehouse, humanoid, AI-native agents)
Margin structure and competitive positioning by layer type
Business model type (hardware-centric, software-only, service/outcome-based)

sections.title: Deployment Economics — The ROI-Per-Unit Framework
required_elements: Fully loaded cost per unit (hardware + software + integration + training)
Labor arbitrage calculation (FTEs replaced per unit at fully loaded labor cost)
Payback period analysis (system cost / annual labor savings)
Utilization rate and uptime targets (85-95% for industrial)
Maintenance & lifecycle costs as % of initial investment
Integration complexity and deployment timeline impact on customer acquisition cost

sections.title: AI Disruption & Enhancement Dynamics
required_elements: LLM and AI impact on RPA/software automation competitive landscape
AI-native automation enablement of new robotics use cases
Proprietary data flywheel assessment (deployment data improving system performance)

sections.title: Financial Logic & Valuation
required_elements: Hardware-centric valuation (EV/Revenue, EV/EBITDA with gross margin normalization)
Software automation SaaS valuation (EV/ARR, NRR-adjusted growth)
Scenario-based DCF for pre-revenue humanoid robotics
Installed base recurring revenue attachment analysis (service contracts, consumables)

sections.title: Pattern Matching & IDP Flagging
required_elements: Order backlog conversion timelines lengthening (demand softening signal)
ASP compression (competitive pricing pressure)
Customer concentration in single industry (cyclical exposure)
Pipeline vs. contracted backlog gap (promotional risk)

sections.title: Investigation Tracks
required_elements: Customer reference calls on deployment ROI realization
AI integration roadmap technical assessment
Competitive technology benchmarking on specific use cases

structural_requirements: All sections present with markdown headings
Automation layer classification clearly stated with margin profile
Fully loaded unit cost calculated including hardware, software, integration, training
Labor arbitrage analysis explicit (FTEs replaced, labor cost per unit, payback period)
Payback period calculated and benchmarked against typical customer ROI requirements
Utilization rate targets documented with maintenance cost % of initial investment
Customer acquisition cost and deployment timeline impacts quantified
AI disruption assessment differentiated between RPA threat and robotics enablement opportunities
Proprietary data moat assessment based on deployment volume and frequency
Installed base recurring revenue calculated as % of total revenue
Valuation methodology appropriate to business stage and model
Investigation tracks include customer reference sources, AI roadmap specifics, and competitive benchmarking data
